description: fetch the current BEPs listing (beps.yml) from bids-website and write references/beps.yml (read-only network fetch)
rules: read-only: fetches a remote artifact, never mutates a remote service
writes the BEPs listing verbatim under record_store
no dependencies beyond the Python standard library
usage: No vars required. Output: beps.yml (the canonical BIDS Extension Proposals listing with titles, leads, status, links).
limitation: Requires network access to reach the bids-website upstream. Offline the porter degrades gracefully — it writes an empty {} artifact and exits 0 so the contract still holds, but the BEPs list is not refreshed.
